title: DefaultSkin
description: Client-side mod that allows the player to toggle custom skins. Developed for FTB Wiki editors to take screenshots without their custom skins.
body:
**Client side only! Do not install on the server!**

This mod adds a keybind that will toggle custom/default palyer skins when installed. It was made with the primary use of easily taking screenshots for [the FTB Wiki](https://ftb.fandom.com), as per the [image uploading guidelines](https://ftb.fandom.com/wiki/Feed_The_Beast_Wiki:Image_uploading_guideline), but I suppose it could be useful for other people as well.
